# programs.vim

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.vim`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.vim.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to configure vim. |
| `programs.vim.enableSensible` | `boolean` | Enable sensible configuration options for vim. |
| `programs.vim.extraKnownPlugins` | `attribute set of package` | Custom plugin declarations to add to VAM's knownPlugins. |
| `programs.vim.plugins` | `list of (attribute set)` | VAM plugin dictionaries to use for vim_configurable. |
| `programs.vim.vimConfig` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Extra vimrcConfig to use for vim_configurable. |
| `programs.vim.vimOptions.<name>.enable` | `boolean` | Whether this file should be generated. This option allows specific files to be disabled. |
| `programs.vim.vimOptions.<name>.source` | `absolute path` | Path of the source file. |
| `programs.vim.vimOptions.<name>.target` | `string` | Name of symlink. Defaults to the attribute name. |
| `programs.vim.vimOptions.<name>.text` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Text of the file. |
